calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Robert H. Peterson, III, Esq. for Plaintiff: Peter Kung, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Church Day Solution, LLC. as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1747 Church St., San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent $42,000.00
Holdover Damages $12,624.64
Attorney's Fees $2,000.00
Costs $390.00, for a total of $57,014.64
Judgment signed in open court.
